Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Striker techniques]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — Striker techniques can be released by Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — The techniques mentioned (Spear of the Golden Sun, Heart-seizing Claw, Phoenix Wing Burst, Song of Falling Ash, Gravetouch, and black dragon's breath) are all Striker techniques.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 2''' — Striker techniques are combat methods used by Yerin's Blood Shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Striker techniques can project power outward.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 7''' — Akura Grace mixes Striker techniques into her attack patterns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 11''' — Striker techniques scorch the air above Lindon during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan's power wiped away Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — Striker techniques can be used against flying targets.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Striker techniques are powerful attacks.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Yan Shoumei used Striker techniques in her match.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon had previously absorbed Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Blood Shadow's sword styles include patterns meant to launch Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The combatants traded slashes and Striker techniques.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Attackers used Striker techniques to slice through stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Lindon uses a barrage of Striker techniques against the Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Striker techniques manifest as pulses of light in every color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Hurling Striker techniques from outside the field did nothing to the Titan.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — The woman uses Striker techniques that involve flying blades.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Striker techniques caused wounds to be cut into pieces from heat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Striker techniques can light up the sky and shake the ground.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 11''' — Northstrider used Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — The Weeping Dragon's hallmark is draconic serpents of blue-and-gold lightning Striker techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Striker techniques are used by Arelius artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Mercy and Yerin used Striker techniques against Malice.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
